final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×3 character expression grid illustration featuring Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) from the IP 仙剑奇侠传, rendered in 3D animation Pixar style, each panel showing her peeking through a torn hole in white paper.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar style; each of the 9 panels framed as a character bust peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Composition: 3×3 grid, 9 equal panels — top row (left / center / right), middle row (left / center / right), bottom row (left / center / right); consistent character scale and torn-paper framing across all panels
Subject: Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) — 仙剑奇侠传 IP; young woman with long flowing light-colored hair, delicate fairy-like features consistent with the character's classic design; expression and outfit vary per panel as follows:
  Top-left — winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  Top-center — smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  Top-right — thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  Middle-left — big smile, arms resting on torn-paper edge, black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center — smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right — neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  Bottom-left — happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center — laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  Bottom-right — silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: each panel backdrop is white paper with a ragged torn hole through which the character peeks; clean white negative space between panels
Lighting/mood: soft, warm, cheerful studio lighting consistent across all 9 panels; bright and playful mood
Color palette: varied per panel outfit (green / red / yellow / black-white / orange / blue / purple / pink / teal); consistent skin tone and hair color across all panels
Materials/textures: smooth 3D render with slight subsurface skin shading; torn paper edge texture on each panel frame
Text (verbatim): 赵灵儿
Constraints: all 9 panels must be clearly distinct; character identity (赵灵儿 / 仙剑奇侠传) must remain consistent across panels; torn-paper framing must appear in every panel; 3×3 grid layout must be legible
Avoid: mixing 2D flat illustration with 3D render; inconsistent character face across panels; cluttered backgrounds; text other than 赵灵儿
